name: Preset Agent Skills
description: AI agent skills for the Preset API — manage workspaces, dashboards, datasets, users, and row-level security.

skills.name: preset-api
skills.description: Authenticate with the Preset Management API. Required by all other skills.

skills.name: preset-workspaces
skills.description: List and manage Preset teams and workspaces, and their membership.

skills.name: preset-dashboards
skills.description: Create, update, export, import, and embed Preset dashboards.

skills.name: preset-datasets
skills.description: Manage database connections and datasets (physical and virtual). Execute SQL queries.

skills.name: preset-users
skills.description: Manage users, roles, and row-level security in Preset workspaces.
